COURT TRIAL ON SEP-18-2006 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 626 BUSH LTD.A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHANSON, CURT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 BUSH ST., #302, SAN FRANCISCO. $2,223.14 RENT, $1,100.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,603.14, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
John Zanghi, Esq. for Plaintiff: 626 Bush Ltd., a California Limited Partnership.
Plaintiff's Witness: Robert Giannini, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Curt Johanson.
Exhibit 1 - Residential Employee Employment Agreement--------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Letter dtd 7-19-05, Termination of Employment-----------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Curt Johanson as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 626 Bush St., #302, San Francisco.
Back-Rent and Damages $2,223.14
Attorney's Fees $1,100.00
Costs $280.00, for a total of $3,603.14
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.
